case_title: CYPRESS INSURANCE COMPANY VS. NEWPORT MEAT COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ACTION FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 63073179) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CYPRESS INSURANCE COMPANY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 64078718)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-10-2019 CONTINUED TO AUG-28-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-08-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CYPRESS INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT NEWPORT MEAT COMPANY KORPELA, GARY DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-10-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-07-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-17-2019

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-08-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) GARY KORPELA OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT; TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-28-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
